metadata.name: Flag Suspicious Activity for SAR Filing

description: A compliance analyst identifies a series of unusual transactions that may require filing a Suspicious Activity Report (SAR).

nodes.task_description: Investigate a transaction monitoring alert for a corporate account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reviews an alert showing multiple large, structured cash deposits.

nodes.task_description: Gather all related transaction data and customer information for the investigation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent compiles a case file with all relevant details.

nodes.task_description: Escalate the case to a senior analyst with a recommendation to file a SAR.

expected_outcome.value: Agent escalates the case and documents the reason for the SAR recommendation.
